data.title: Scenario 1 — English translation
data.excerpt: A test page verifying manual translation from Danish to English.
data.author: Redaktionen
data.content:
This page was created as an English translation of the Danish source document. It is used to test the manual translation workflow in the CMS — where an editor creates an English version and writes the text themselves.

Ski holidays in the Alps are a classic Danish tradition. Every year, thousands of Danish families head south to enjoy snow, sun, and après-ski. From the Austrian Alps to the French ski resorts, the possibilities are endless.
